sdapi_pages.title: Sports DataTennis API Index and User Guide
headings: Sports DataTennis API Index and User Guide
tables: https is the default request type.
Request domain to access the Sports Data API. For most clients, this is the default: api.performfeeds.com Use the defaul
Resource of the Sports Data API. In this case, the Tennis API: tennisdata
Feed name of the resource in the Tennis API. For example: squads
Outlet Authentication Key . A unique 26-character alphanumeric UUID which is unique to each outlet. Any requests made wi
Query parameters . There are required and optional parameters. Optional parameters can help you to search the feed and c
Competition Schedule (MA0) Competition Schedule (MA0) Get details on the competition schedule, such as court information
Tournament (MA1) Tournament (MA1) Get details of tournaments, such as start and end date, round information, competition
Match Stats (MA2) Match Stats (MA2) Get detailed match statistics for each player, including aces, break points won/lost
Match Events (MA3) Match Events (MA3) Get all events in a game - including the player, team, event, type, time (minute a
Match (MA4) Match (MA4) Get information about an individual match and its contestants
Match_Detailed (MA4_Detailed) Match_Detailed (MA4_Detailed) Get detailed information about an individual match and its c
Match Preview (MA8) Match Preview (MA8) Provides match preview data and contains information about previous meetings bet
